THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESSLINGER, ROBERT ESSLINGER, LORETTA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 335-A OAK ST, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL APR-05-1994, RENT & DAMAGES WVD. AS LONG AS DEF. VACATES BY 5PM, 4-5-94. WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY. SEC. DEP. RETAINED BY PL. EACH SIDE BEARS THEIR COSTS & ATTY FEES.
